firstChapter.llmPrompt: Create a cinematic fantasy digital painting, 16:9, atmospheric dawn wide shot. endings.llmPrompt: Create a dramatic dark-fantasy ending scene, 16:9, dynamic low-angle composition. Living briar walls surge inward at twilight, roots split stone and wet soil, and a fallen explorer is trapped as a dropped knife sinks in mud. Rain streaks and thorn silhouettes frame the collapse. Palette: bruised greens, black bark, cold silver rain. Emotion: panic and irreversible loss. No explicit gore, no text, no watermark.

Create a hopeful fantasy finale image, 16:9, cinematic dawn composition. endings.llmPrompt: Create a breathtaking hard-sci-fi first-contact ending image, 16:9, wide exterior-interior composition. Inside, a lone crew member in a pressure suit stands facing them with one hand raised to the glass, comm open. Artifact is dark. Mood: awe, fragile peace, and the weight of being first. No text, no watermark.

Create a tragic sci-fi disaster ending scene, 16:9, dynamic structural-collapse composition. A belt station breaks apart from within—ring sections separate, support pylons snap, emergency pod bays are sealed and dark, and debris spirals into the void. Create a hopeful hard-sci-fi resolution image, 16:9, intimate interior composition. Through the viewport, the alien Fracture cluster drifts apart into the asteroid belt, dispersing peacefully. Mood: quiet relief, exhausted resolution, and the beginning of understanding.
